objective: Add a no-secret owner-fillable production refs input template before external refs provisioning.
model_delta: No new runtime model; MOD-ADP-030 now includes no-secret template generation for production refs readiness input.
formula_delta: Refreshed FORM-ADP-024 because cli.py::main changed, and refreshed FORM-ADP-032 after adding build_production_refs_input_template.
parameter_delta: Added PARAM-ADP-162 for required production refs template sections.
tests_run: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_refs_template_cli PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m arxiv_daily_push print-production-refs-template --runner-label arxiv-daily-push-prod --release-target adp-private | python3 -m json.tool >/tmp/codex_adp_refs_template.json

PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_refs_template_plan PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m arxiv_daily_push plan-production-refs --readiness-input /tmp/codex_adp_refs_template.json --generated-at 2026-06-22T20:00:00+10:00 --json >/tmp/codex_adp_refs_template_report.json; test "$?" -eq 2
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_refs_template_arxiv PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s arxiv-daily-push/tests -q
python3 -c "import json,pathlib; [json.loads(line) for line in pathlib.Path('arxiv-daily-push/docs/governance/development_events.jsonl').read_text().splitlines() if line.strip()]"

generated template plan-production-refs: expected blocked exit 2
example production refs JSON: parse OK
semantic extractor: 161 active parameters and 32 active formulas checked with no errors
changed-only enforce-sync semantic: errors 0 warnings 0; all registered projects errors 0 warnings 0
manifest JSON and development_events JSONL parse: pass
cache check: no __pycache__, pyc, pytest, mypy, or ruff cache files
rollback: Remove the template function, CLI command, example JSON, tests, runbook section, phase record, manifest, and governance updates, then restore version 0.11.21.
risks: The template only reduces no-secret owner input errors; it does not prove external refs are provisioned.

Production launch and 30-day acceptance remain blocked by external refs, explicit launch confirmation, trial-start evidence, real SMTP/Release evidence, replay/recovery/resource evidence, and 30 daily production entries.
